name: European TTF Natural Gas
summary: Day 71 Saturday. **TTF €43.99/MWh MAY 8 (+0.98% 1D, ~-8% MoM off March peak, ~+40% from pre-war €31.20 baseline) — STABILIZED IN €42-48 RANGE; PRICING PARTIAL RELIEF ON CEASEFIRE OPTIONALITY EVEN AS HORMUZ BLOCKED DAY 71.** Cheniere CCO Anatol Feygin May 7: 'astounded that global gas prices have not risen higher with the closure of the Strait of Hormuz disrupting 100 cargoes a month' (Bloomberg) — generalized observation that international gas markets have absorbed the supply shock so far. TTF remains BELOW €70+ cascade-intensity threshold; trigger 'TTF crosses €70/MWh sustained 5 sessions' NOT ACTIVATED through May 8. **Structural offsets intact:** (a) Hormuz functionally closed (zero May 7 transits, 1,500 vessels anchored) but kinetic-war probability compressed; (b) European inventory refill window tightening into summer (storage at 5-year seasonal low); (c) Qatar Ras Laffan Trains 4/6 (12.8 mtpa, ~17% Qatar LNG) still 3-5yr recovery. ECB has not characterized Hormuz risk as systemic. **TTF-Brent decoupling persists:** Brent +1.66% 1D May 8 to $101.73 while TTF only +0.98%; paper TTF continues to behave more like inflation event than crisis event. If MOU signs by May 14, TTF could continue to compress toward €40-42 area; if Iran rejects past May 21, TTF re-bids back toward €52-55. **Cheniere $3.5B Q1 GAAP loss on derivative MtM** demonstrates US LNG players are SHORT the war via hedge books on the same prices that benefit them operationally — not directly TTF-relevant but signals integrated-LNG contractual structures.

current.vs_2022_crisis: still below 2022 crisis levels (€100+); below cascade-intensity threshold €70+

recent_signals.headline: TTF CRASHED -6.8% MAY 6 TO ~€47.4/MWh ON MOU SCOOP — pricing pause as plausibly durable. -28% est 1M / +35% est 3M. MOU 'both sides lift Hormuz blockades' provision priced Qatar Ras Laffan reopening expectation. TTF still below €70+ cascade-intensity threshold; structural offsets (Hormuz closed, inventory tight, Ras Laffan 3-5yr recovery) intact.
